name: polaris-browser-use
description: Control a browser via DOM extraction and precise element interaction (DOM/Accessibility Tree instead of screenshots).

interface.shortDescription: Navigate, extract DOM structure, and precisely interact with web elements.
interface.longDescription:
Advanced browser automation via custom Python MCP server. Operates using DOM extraction and unique component IDs instead of pixel coordinates, drastically reducing hallucination.

Requires: Python.
defaultPrompt: Navigate to https://example.com and take a screenshot.
Click the login button on the current page.
Fill in the search box with 'AI agents'.
